escalation.rationale: Multiple concurrent conflicts with US-Iran military tensions, Trump threatening imminent strikes, NATO considering Hormuz mission, and China-Russia military cooperation intensifying.

ticker_items: Trump says US may attack Iran within days
NATO considering Hormuz deployment mission by July
China reportedly training 200 Russian troops for Ukraine
Russia warns of catastrophic NATO conflict after nuclear test
Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz, imposes subsea cable fees

new_entrant.text: China has entered active military involvement by reportedly training 200 Russian troops for Ukraine deployment.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones intercepted over Russian capital during overnight strikes
Russian strike damages Ukrainian port infrastructure in southern region
Ukraine stepped up drone attacks as Russia holds nuclear forces drills

middle_east.description: Drones launched from Iraq struck generator near Barakah nuclear power plant
CENTCOM investigating strike on school in Minab under complex inquiry
Drone strike caused fire near UAE nuclear plant but no injuries or radiation leak reported.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

russia.text: Russian and Chinese foreign policy interests align on key international and regional issues
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

russia.text: The three-day exercise will involve 64,000 troops, over 200 missile launchers, more than 140 aircraft, 73 surface warships and 13 submarines
russia.speaker: Russian Defense Ministry
russia.title: Official Statement

russia.text: The likelihood of a head-on clash between Russia and NATO is continuing to grow
russia.speaker: Sergei Ryabkov
russia.title: Deputy Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: If Iran rejects US dictates, a strike will happen
middle_east.speaker: Eli Cohen
middle_east.title: Israeli Minister

middle_east.text: We give them two to three days to reach a deal
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: If we dismantle Hezbollah, there won't be explosive drones
middle_east.speaker: Brig. Gen. Amir Avivi
middle_east.title: Israeli Military Official

middle_east.text: Iran needs reality check, Trump understands something must be done
middle_east.speaker: Danny Danon
middle_east.title: Israeli Ambassador to UN

middle_east.text: Not logical to give protection to Ukrainian males - Brussels should strip fighting-age Ukrainians of protection
middle_east.speaker: EU special envoy
middle_east.title: EU Special Envoy

observers.description: Xi Jinping hosts Putin for high-level summit in Beijing focusing on economic cooperation and regional security issues. The meeting comes just days after Trump's visit to China, highlighting Beijing's balancing act between major powers.

Lithuanian Foreign Minister calls for NATO strikes on Russia's Kaliningrad exclave to send message to Moscow. This represents one of the most aggressive public positions taken by a NATO ally regarding direct military action against Russia.
Pakistani Shia nationals in UAE facing detention and questioning due to Iran war spillover effects. Civil engineer detained by Etihad Rail after reporting to police.

NATO discussing Hormuz deployment to protect ships if waterway not reopened by July. Alliance considering shift in strategy toward US-Israeli war in Iran. Internal discussions about survival and future structure amid potential US withdrawal concerns.
Turkey maintaining position in regional conflicts while participating in broader diplomatic initiatives. Country remains strategically positioned between NATO obligations and regional relationships.

financial.notes: Oil prices slid after Iran indicated US agreed to lift oil sanctions during talks.

update_log.text: NATO discussing Hormuz deployment mission if strait not reopened by early July
Trump says US may attack Iran within days if no agreement reached
China reportedly training 200 Russian troops for Ukraine deployment
Russia warns of catastrophic NATO conflict after testing nuclear missile
Iran imposing fees on subsea internet cables in Strait of Hormuz
UAE confirms drones that hit Barakah nuclear plant launched from Iraqi territory
NATO discussing possible Hormuz deployment if strait not reopened by July
Russia begins massive nuclear forces drills with 64,000 troops amid Ukraine drone attacks
Iran reopens stock exchange after longest shutdown in history due to war
Putin arrives in Beijing for summit with Xi Jinping amid ongoing global conflicts
Russia begins three-day nationwide nuclear readiness drills with 64,000 troops
Trump sets 2-3 day deadline for Iran to reach agreement ending current conflict
Ukrainian drones intercepted over Moscow as cross-border strikes intensify
